ops.title: P4: Swift DaemonKit + templates
ops.description: SPM DaemonKit (WireEnvelope, SocketServer serial-queue, PeerTrust ported from authkit CallerCheck, XPCTrust pin-before-resume, SnapshotWatcher directory-vnode, LoginItem.reconcile, RealHome) + templates (project.yml.tmpl with xcconfig version injection, entitlements, cask .rb.tmpl). Widget reloads coalesce ≥5min.

ops.text: Template renders a building sample app
AppKeepAlive→SMAppService go/no-go recorded (after Track F live proof)
